commit.message:
feat: data ingestion system — drag & drop, progress bars, document categories, email inbox

Phase 2-5 of data ingestion:
- Drag & drop with folder support (webkitGetAsEntry)
- Per-file upload progress bars via XMLHttpRequest
- Document categories UI grouped by 7 knowledge topics
- Expandable docs with extracted data preview
- Email inbox address with copy button and instructions
- Storage usage bar (500MB quota)
- File type accept attribute on input
- Google Drive / Dropbox "Coming Soon" placeholders

Phase 1 (security) was applied directly to Supabase:
- Documents RLS: company-scoped via user_id
- Storage RLS: folder-scoped to company_id
- upload-document v14: magic-byte MIME validation, blocked extensions, 500MB quota
- New columns: documents.scan_status, companies.storage_used_bytes

docs(api): add OpenAPI spec and interactive API explorer (#389)

- Add swaggo/swag as a Go tool dependency (go.mod)
- Create internal/api/doc.go with global swag annotation block (12 tags, Bearer + ApiKey auth schemes)
- Annotate all ~95 handler functions across 17 handler files with swag comments (@Summary, @Tags, @Param, @Success, @Failure, @Security, @Router)
- Generate docs/static/swagger.yaml and docs/static/swagger.json via swag init
- Add docs/src/pages/api-explorer.tsx: interactive Swagger UI page using BrowserOnly + swagger-ui-react
- Add API Explorer link to the Docusaurus navbar
- Add gen-swagger script to docs/package.json
- Replace verbose endpoints.md stub with concise overview + link to /api-explorer
- Add webpack stream polyfill plugin to docusaurus.config.ts for swagger-ui-react compatibility

commit.message:
fix: MQTT field map — payload uses snake_case, not camelCase

The Beem MQTT streaming payload sends power fields as snake_case
(solar_power, battery_power, grid_power, inverter_power) not camelCase
(solarPower, batteryPower, meterPower). This caused all power sensors
to read 0W while SoC/SoH worked fine. Now maps both formats.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite skill.md: game loop first, executable code upfront

The previous version caused agents to register + join queue then stop.
Now leads with CRITICAL game loop requirement, puts complete runnable
Python agent at the top, and restructures as action-oriented reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Move output constraints to top of system prompt

Gemini 2.5 Flash tends to ignore mid-prompt instructions.
Move the critical constraints (200 char limit, 3 sentences max,
no markdown, max 2 menu items) to the very first lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ephemeral git sessions, remove session management infrastructure

Git sessions now auto-destroy on detach via tmux destroy-unattached,
eliminating the need for session tracking, listing, and manual cleanup.
Removed crew stop, crew kill, crew ls sessions, and all supporting code.

Migrate trade notifications from Telegram to Discord Webhooks (#204)

* auto-claude: subtask-1-1 - Add 4 Discord webhook URL fields to Settings class

Added Discord webhook support to TradeNotifier:
- Added _discord_webhook_urls instance variable
- Updated configure() method to accept discord_webhook_urls parameter
- Implemented _send_to_discord() method with proper error handling
- Updated module and class docstrings to reflect Discord support
- Method follows same pattern as _send_to_telegram()

- Changed return type from str to dict

- Maintained all original information: symbol, korean_name, decision, confidence, reasons, market_type

- Color: 0x00BFFF (Deep Sky Blue for automation)
- Fields include: 처리 종목, 분석 완료, 매수 주문, 매도 주문, 실행 시간
- Adds error field only when errors > 0

- Changed return type from str (markdown) to dict (Discord embed)
- Set color to 0xFF6600 (orange) for failure notifications

- 국내주식 → discord_webhook_kr

Updated notify_trade_failure() to route to Discord webhook based on market_type:
- US/해외주식 → discord_webhook_us
- 국내주식 → discord_webhook_kr
- 암호화폐 → discord_webhook_crypto

This aligns with the pattern used by other notification methods like
notify_buy_order(), notify_sell_order(), etc.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* auto-claude: subtask-3-8 - Implement Telegram fallback in notification methods

Added Telegram fallback logic to all market-type-based notification methods:
- notify_buy_order()
- notify_sell_order()
- notify_cancel_orders()
- notify_analysis_complete()
- notify_trade_failure()

Each method now:
1. Tries to send to Discord webhook first (if configured)
2. Falls back to Telegram if Discord fails or is not configured
3. Returns True if either method succeeds, False if both fail

Added 5 new Telegram formatter methods that mirror the Discord embed formatters:
- _format_buy_notification_telegram()
- _format_sell_notification_telegram()
- _format_cancel_notification_telegram()
- _format_analysis_notification_telegram()
- _format_failure_notification_telegram()

Created comprehensive E2E verification infrastructure for Discord webhook
integration:

   - E2E_VERIFICATION_GUIDE.md: Comprehensive guide (in .auto-claude)
   - subtask-6-3-verification-summary.md: Completion summary (in .auto-claude)

Features:

- Includes manual curl test examples
- Supports automated and manual verification

* fix: Resolve undefined _discord_webhook_urls attribute in Toss notification methods

Fixed critical bug where Toss notification methods (notify_toss_buy_recommendation,
notify_toss_sell_recommendation, notify_toss_price_recommendation) called
_send_to_discord_embed() which referenced undefined self._discord_webhook_urls
attribute, causing AttributeError at runtime.

Changes:
- Updated Toss notification methods to use market-type routing via
  _get_webhook_for_market_type() and _send_to_discord_embed_single()
- Added market_type parameter to notify_toss_price_recommendation()
- Added market_type parameter to _format_toss_price_recommendation_html()
- Added '시장' (market) field to Toss price recommendation embed for consistency
- Defined self._discord_webhook_urls in __init__ and configure() for backward
  compatibility with legacy _send_to_discord() and _send_to_discord_embed() methods

Verified:
- Code compiles successfully
- All references to self._discord_webhook_urls now properly defined
- Backward compatibility maintained

QA Fix Session: 0

* fix: Update Toss notification tests to check Discord embed format

Fixed test regression in test_toss_notification.py where 6 tests were failing because they expected string return values but the formatters now return Discord embed dicts.

Changes:
- Updated test_format_toss_buy_recommendation_toss_only to check dict structure
- Updated test_format_toss_buy_recommendation_with_kis to check dict structure
- Updated test_format_toss_sell_recommendation_toss_only to check dict structure
- Updated test_format_toss_sell_recommendation_with_kis to check dict structure
- Updated test_format_toss_buy_recommendation_usd to check dict structure
- Updated test_format_toss_sell_recommendation_negative_profit to check dict structure

All tests now verify Discord embed fields (title, color, description) and field values instead of string content.

Verified:
- All 30 tests in test_toss_notification.py now pass
- All 6 previously failing tests now pass

QA Fix Session: 1

* test: cover worker notifier startup regression

Ultraworked with [Sisyphus](https://github.com/code-yeongyu/oh-my-opencode)

Fix: JS costCalculator outside script tag + auto-deduct balance on billing

1. dashboard.blade.php: costCalculator() function was outside the
   closing </script> tag, causing it to render as visible page text
   instead of executing as JavaScript. Moved closing tag to after
   the function.

2. BillingItem: Add booted() observer to automatically decrement
   companies.balance when a billing item is accrued, and restore
   it when voided. Previously billing items were only written to
   the ledger with no effect on the company balance field.

1. Update Go version 1.24.0 → 1.26.0 in all workflows

2. Fix Release job dependency
   - Removed blocking dependency on build-docker (was disabled)

commit.message:
fix: database init crash on fresh Android install

The books CREATE TABLE was missing Migration 5 columns (hardcover_id,
hardcover_review, community_rating, community_rating_count, page_count,
cover_url). The index on hardcover_id ran BEFORE migrations, throwing
"no such column" and crashing initDatabase(). This caused getAllBooks()
to return [] on every call, making the library appear empty.

- Add Migration 5 columns to CREATE TABLE for fresh installs
- Wrap index creation loop in try/catch for safety

commit.message:
feat: 添加CAN总线丢帧处理完整工具集

新增7种丢帧处理策略，形成工业级故障处理体系：

核心策略文件:
1. diagnostics.go - 诊断工具
   - 自动分析丢帧原因
   - 提供健康状态报告
   - 给出针对性建议

2. adaptive.go - 动态缓冲区扩容
   - 自动检测使用率并扩容
   - 支持1000->10000动态调整
   - 适合突发流量场景

3. adaptive_ecu.go - 自适应ECU发送频率
   - 根据丢帧率自动调整发送频率
   - 支持50ms~500ms动态范围
   - 从源头控制流量

4. priority_bus.go - 基于优先级的智能丢帧
   - 优先级队列实现(heap)
   - 丢弃低优先级帧(温度)，保留高优先级帧(车速)
   - 符合真实CAN总线仲裁逻辑

5. backpressure.go - 背压反馈机制
   - 总线向ECU发送背压信号
   - 闭环控制，自动平衡生产和消费
   - 分3级背压等级(正常/警告/严重)

6. listener_monitor.go - 监听器性能监控
   - 监控每个监听器处理时间
   - 自动识别慢监听器(>5ms)
   - 定期生成性能报告

7. sampling.go - 采样降级策略
   - 支持100%/50%/25%/10%采样率
   - 紧急情况快速降级
   - 自动根据负载调整

8. combo_strategy.go - 组合策略示例
   - 集成背压+监控+动态调频
   - 提供最佳实践组合
   - 包含使用示例和决策树

文档:
- DROP_FRAME_GUIDE.md - 完整处理指南
  - 丢帧根因诊断流程
  - 7种策略详解和对比
  - 决策树和快速修复指南
  - 性能对比表和推荐配置

技术亮点:
- 分层防御体系：监控->预防->降级->丢帧
- 自适应控制：自动检测+自动调整
- 工业级实现：优先级队列、背压机制、采样降级
- 零侵入设计：包装模式，无需修改现有代码

适用场景:
- 轻微丢帧(0.1-1%): 监听器性能监控
- 中度丢帧(1-5%): 组合策略(背压+优化+扩容)
- 严重丢帧(>5%): 紧急降级(采样+降频+优先级)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent auto-copy on plain click in session terminal (#94)

A single click (mouse down + up without drag) was creating a Selection
with start == end, causing the character under the cursor to be copied
to clipboard. Normal terminals only copy on click-and-drag.

Now on MouseUp, if start == end (no drag occurred), the selection is
cleared without copying — matching standard terminal behavior.

commit.message:
fix: increase SSL Labs polling retries from 9 to 15 (5 min timeout)

SSL Labs scan was consistently timing out — all 9 attempts returned
IN_PROGRESS before the grade was available. Increasing to 15 attempts
(×20s = 5 min) gives the scan enough time to complete.

commit.message:
Système de factures mixte (récupérée OU 2h après)

**Logique de disponibilité facture :**
- ✅ Commande récupérée → facture dispo immédiatement
- ✅ 2h après heure retrait → facture dispo automatiquement
- ✅ Commande annulée → jamais de facture
- ✅ Message d'attente si trop tôt

**Avantages :**
- Zéro risque annulation après facture générée
- Automatique (marche même si Paco oublie)
- Conforme (comme Uber Eats)
- Propre (pas besoin facture d'avoir)

feat(blueprint): add CalibrationPanel for PPI-aware geometry vectorization

Frontend integration for Blueprint Lab calibration workflow:

CalibrationPanel.vue (new):
- Brand/model dropdowns for known scale lengths (Fender, Gibson, PRS, Other)
- Paper size selector (Letter, A4, Tabloid)
- Auto-calibrate button with calibration options
- Manual two-point calibration form
- Results display with PPI, method, confidence badges
- Low confidence warning box
- Re-calibrate and Accept buttons
- Accepted state indicator

useBlueprintWorkflow.ts:
- Add CalibrationResult, CalibrationOptions, ManualCalibrationPoints types
- Add isCalibrating, calibration, calibrationAccepted state
- Add calibrateBlueprint(), manualCalibrate(), acceptCalibration(), resetCalibration() actions
- Update vectorizeGeometry() to pass calibration_id when available
- Add instrumentType, darkThreshold, gapCloseSize to VectorParams
- Update currentPhase computed to include calibration step

BlueprintLab.vue:
- Import and wire CalibrationPanel between Phase 1 and Phase 2
- Add calibration phase badge in header
- Add calibration state and actions from composable
- Add calibration event handlers with data transformation

This enables PPI-aware scaling for accurate real-world dimensions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
